items.title: Balaclava law welcomed as residents of Meath village  terrorised by teenagers on scrambler bikes
Drogheda paramedics accuse HSE of treating them as ‘second-class citizens’ over wellness room snub
The full David Humphreys interview: Ronan O’Gara will be in the mix for Leinster, the IRFU’s role in Munster controversy and James Lowe’s Ireland exit
My holiday from hell: I went to Ibiza at 16 - and am still haunted by what I saw in a bathroom sink
items.summary: I didn’t see being a couple of years away from technically qualifying for an 18-30s jaunt to be a problem. But the booze, humiliation and a ‘mystery pooer’ made me rethink my entire life‘First the bad news,” yelled our lairy Irish club rep as the coach drove us from Ibiza airport to our hotel. “All the great clubs: Amnesia, Space, Pacha … they’re CLOSED!”A confused silence descended.

items.title: ‘I was a self-centred, entitled little horror ... arguably I still am’: cult psych rocker Robyn Hitchcock talks to Stewart Lee
items.summary: Armed with a new album inspired by ‘dead English blokes’, the revered musician discusses writing nasty songs about his neighbours and how he’s finally made it in Nashville aged 73‘I owe a lot to a dead man’s cock.” So begins the first song, a propulsive piece of Lennonesque powerpop called I Am This Thing, on The Confuser, the latest album by the 73-year-old English gentleman survivor of the 60s/70s frontline, Robyn Hitchcock.

items.title: Gurriers at The Button Factory, Dublin
items.summary: The post Gurriers at The Button Factory, Dublin appeared first on Goldenplec.com Gurriers at The Button Factory, Dublin on Friday December 19th, 2026 Gurriers, the last diamond to be forged from Ireland’s post-punk scene before the mine collapsed, played two sold-out shows in The Button Factory this week on a landmark occasion for a group who have outgrown their sweaty club origins.

items.title: Kingfishr at 3Arena, Dublin
items.summary: The post Kingfishr at 3Arena, Dublin appeared first on Goldenplec.com   Kingfishr at 3Arena, Dublin on December 18th 2025 One of the most anticipated concerts of the year occurred on an absolutely freezing Thursday night, with Kingfishr taking the stage of the 3arena for the first of their two sold out shows.

items.title: Ryan Tubridy shares rare pic with wife Clare on Dublin date night
items.summary: Ryan Tubridy and his wife Dr Clare Kambamettu rarely share snaps together, but the couple beamed as they stepped out for a date night at a charity dinner at Leinster House

items.title: MetroLink cost could increase as revised business case awaits Government decision
items.summary: The last estimated cost of the Dublin MetroLink project was from 2021 and ranged between €7.16 billion and €12.25 billion, but those figures may no longer reflect current construction inflation

items.title: Brian Potter, ‘Rhinestone Cowboy’ Co-Producer & ’70s Hit Songwriter, Dies at 87
items.summary: With partner Dennis Lambert, Potter scored Billboard hits for Glen Campbell, Player, Tavares, the Four Tops & more.
